testcase.name: test_delivery_login

failure.message: AssertionError: Delivery login failed: 401 assert 401 == 200 + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_order_tracking.py:54: in test_delivery_login assert response.status_code == 200, f"Delivery login failed: {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Delivery login failed: 401 E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_delivery_pickup_endpoint_exists

failure.message: AssertionError: Unexpected status: 401 assert 401 in [403, 404, 400] + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_order_tracking.py:256: in test_delivery_pickup_endpoint_exists assert response.status_code in [403, 404, 400], f"Unexpected status: {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Unexpected status: 401 E assert 401 in [403, 404, 400] E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

failure.message: AssertionError: Available orders failed: 404 assert 404 in [200, 403] + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_order_tracking.py:278: in test_delivery_available_orders_endpoint assert response.status_code in [200, 403], f"Available orders failed: {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Available orders failed: 404 E assert 404 in [200, 403] E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code
